title: Maya's Research Project
description: A narrative lesson integrating research vocabulary, methodology, and presentation skills.
summary_pt_br: Narrativa de pesquisa: hipótese, método, achados, implicações, próximos passos.

scenes.subtitle_en: A narrative lesson integrating research vocabulary, methodology, and presentation skills.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Narrativa de pesquisa: hipótese, método, achados, implicações, próximos passos.

scenes.text_en: A narrative lesson integrating research vocabulary, methodology, and presentation skills. Today's focus: maya's research project. I hypothesized that coral growth correlates with water temperature.
scenes.text_pt: Narrativa de pesquisa: hipótese, método, achados, implicações, próximos passos. Foco de hoje: maya's research project. Hipótese: crescimento de coral se correlaciona com temperatura.

scenes.title: Maya's Research Project
scenes.body_en: Research narrative: hypothesis → method → findings → implications → next steps. Hedging and passive voice throughout.
scenes.body_pt: Narrativa de pesquisa: hipótese, método, achados, implicações, próximos passos.

examples.en: I hypothesized that coral growth correlates with water temperature.
examples.pt: Hipótese: crescimento de coral se correlaciona com temperatura.

examples.en: Data were collected from three sites over twelve weeks.
examples.pt: Dados coletados de 3 locais por 12 semanas.

examples.en: Further investigation is needed to draw firmer conclusions.
examples.pt: Mais investigação é necessária para conclusões mais firmes.

exercise.question: Complete: "I ___ that coral growth correlates with water temperature."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I hypothesized that coral growth correlates with water temperature."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Hipótese: crescimento de coral se correlaciona com temperatura.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Data were collected from three sites over twelve weeks.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "Data were collected from three sites over twelve weeks."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Dados coletados de 3 locais por 12 semanas.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: Maya's Research Project — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre maya's research project. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Maya, what's your research question this year?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: How does water temperature affect coral growth?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I hypothesized warmer water accelerates growth.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Data were collected from three reef sites weekly.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The data suggests a weak positive correlation.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What are the implications for marine conservation?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Warmer oceans may briefly help some species, harm others.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Further investigation is needed. Welcome to real science.

scenes.title: The science fair
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize Maya's research, findings, and implications. Use at least three research terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Maya stood next to her tri-fold poster, nervous but ready, as the first judge approached her station.

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: I hypothesized that coral growth would correlate positively with water temperature within a defined range.

paragraphs.speaker: Judge
paragraphs.en: And what methodology did you use to test that correlation over your study period?

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: Data were collected weekly from three reef sites over a total of twelve continuous weeks.

paragraphs.speaker: Judge
paragraphs.en: Your conclusion is humble — further investigation is needed. That's the mark of real science.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Twelve years old, one poster, and a quiet understanding that curiosity was going to be her lifelong profession.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Maya's Research Project". A narrative lesson integrating research vocabulary, methodology, and presentation skills. I hypothesized that coral growth correlates with water temperature. Data were collected from three sites over twelve weeks. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Maya's Research Project". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Maya's Research Project".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
